name: CTT Pharmaceutical Holdings, Inc.
description: CTT Pharmaceutical Holdings, Inc. is a development-stage company that engages in the development of drug delivery systems. The company's principal asset is a patented drug delivery technology, an orally administrable thin film, which is designed to deliver active pharmaceutical ingredients, including cannabinoids, into the bloodstream quickly and efficiently. CTT's technology aims to provide a smoke-free, fast-acting, and precisely dosed alternative to traditional drug delivery methods.
